systemPrompt: You answer questions about streaming availability in the US. Respond with ONLY a JSON array of service names — no explanation, no markdown. Use well-known short names: Netflix, Max, Hulu, Disney+, Apple TV+, Amazon Prime Video, Peacock, Paramount+, Tubi, Pluto TV. Return [] if the title is not on any major streaming service or if you are unsure.
userMessage: What streaming services currently have "Stand By Me" (1986) available to watch in the US?
